## What kind of suggestion?

- [ ] New detection rule (an AI tool's residue not yet covered)
- [ ] New host adapter (an AI coding tool not in the matrix)
- [ ] Profile or override behavior
- [ ] Other

<!-- What leaked or was inconvenient without this? -->

<!-- For a new rule: the artifact path/glob and the AI tool it comes from. -->
<!-- For a host adapter: which tool and how it reads rules (AGENTS.md-aware?). -->
